English: Send an email to "[test@example.com](mailto:test@example.com)" with the subject "Important Document" and the body "Hello, please check the attached document." including the file "C:/Documents/important.pdf".
Script:
{
  "cron": "",
  "period": -1,
  "script": "
    (#EmailProvider).emailProvider_sendMailWithFile('test@example.com', 'Important Document', 'Hello, please check the attached document.', 'C:/Documents/important.pdf')
  "
}
